children.label: A
children.text: for 2011 through 2024, the Medicare coverage gap discount program under ; andsection 1395w–114a of this title

children.label: B
children.text: for 2025 and each subsequent year, the manufacturer discount program under ;section 1395w–114c of this title

children.label: A
children.text: for 2011 through 2024, an agreement described in subsection (b) of with the Secretary; andsection 1395w–114a of this title

children.label: B

have entered into and have in effect, under terms and conditions specified by the Secretary, a contract with a third party that the Secretary has entered into a contract with under subsection (d)(3) of .section 1395w–114a of this title

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: b Effective date
children.text: Paragraphs (1)(A), (2)(A), and (3) of subsection (a) shall apply to covered part D drugs dispensed under this part on or after , and before , and paragraphs (1)(B) and (2)(B) of such subsection shall apply to covered part D drugs dispensed under this part on or after .January 1, 2011January 1, 2025January 1, 2025

children.heading: Authorizing coverage for drugs not covered under agreements
children.label: c Authorizing coverage for drugs not covered under agreements
A
children.text: the Secretary has made a determination that the availability of the drug is essential to the health of beneficiaries under this part; or

children.label: B
children.text: the Secretary determines that in the period beginning on , and , there were extenuating circumstances.January 1, 2011December 31, 20111So in original. Probably should be followed by “ending on”.1

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 2 Exception
children.text: Paragraph (1)(A) shall not apply to a covered part D drug of a manufacturer for any period described in section 5000D(c)(1) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 with respect to the manufacturer.

children.heading: Definition of manufacturer
children.label: d Definition of manufacturer
children.text: In this section, the term “manufacturer” has the meaning given such term in .section 1395w–114a(g)(5) of this title
